headline: SentinelOne’s Gartner Leader Streak And What It May Mean For Investors
summary: SentinelOne (NYSE:S) has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Protection Platforms. This is the sixth consecutive year the company has received a Leader placement. The recognition highlights progress in its AI driven Singularity Platform and recent platform expansions. SentinelOne (NYSE:S) focuses on autonomous cybersecurity, with its Singularity Platform using AI to help protect endpoints across cloud, on premises, and hybrid environments. The latest...

headline: Harness Launches Two New Products to Give Enterprise Engineering Teams Full Visibility into ROI of AI Spend
summary: Harness, the AI Software Delivery Platform™ company, today announced two new products: AI DLC Insights and Cloud & AI Cost Management. Together, they give engineering organizations real-time visibility into every dollar spent on AI and whether that investment is producing measurable outcomes.

headline: Genesis Computing Recognised in Gartner's "Data Engineering 2.0" Research
summary: Genesis Computing has been recognised in Gartner's "Data Engineering 2.0" research report (G00852814, April 2026) for agentic automation in data engineering.

headline: Gartner® Names Keeper Security the Second Fastest-Growing Company in the Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025
summary: Keeper Security, the leading zero-trust and zero-knowledge identity security and Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform, today announces its recognition as the second fastest-growing competitor in the worldwide security software market in 2025, according to the Gartner Market Share Analysis: Security Software, Worldwide, 2025 report. Keeper achieved a year-over-year global revenue growth rate of 53.42%, 3.45x greater than the overall market average of 15.50%, ranking second only to Google i
